parsed_output.justification: James is the most suspicious player because he contradicted his own role claim, first stating he was a villager and later claiming to be the Seer. Furthermore, his claim that the Werewolf was in the center is a common bluff used by Werewolves to convince the village that no one among the players needs to be eliminated. Since Justin's claim as the Robber is consistent and Alvin and Mitchell have maintained simple villager claims, James's erratic behavior makes him the most likely Werewolf.
